title: 有馬記念の後に・世紀末覇王、爆誕！

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ahh! The first sun of this new era shines bright.
The world has been blessed with the birth of a
champion.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And at long last, I now outshine that sun. Yes! I
am the Royal Sun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooooooo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O claims a perfect victory!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The curtain has fallen on the generational battle
for supremacy that has raged since late last year!
Welcome to a new era!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Well, Trainer? What have you to say in the
presence of the Centurial Overlord?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
How do I come across in the eyes of the one who
birthed the new ruler?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Is that so? Well, you must not forget your
presence glows in the eyes of others too.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We, you see, are twin suns—the strongest in all
history.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, will you lead me to my throne, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are the only one left who can take my hand
and not be rendered powerless by my majesty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I reverently take her hand and guide her to the
winner's circle.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Dear fans, the road has been long and arduous!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I declare here and now that, with this victory, I
have become the Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The end of the century is upon us! My enemies are
powerless before me. Powerless!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, ladies and gentlemen, what is it that makes
a king?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Many thoughts surely come to mind. However,
only one condition is absolute.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And that is to never betray the faithful.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Heretofore, my running bespoke the Overlord, as
so did my record.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And henceforth, as the Centurial Overlord, I vow
to maintain a certain and flawless winning streak!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
All I ask in return is your faith and homage. I shall
see to it your loyalty is repaid.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The lead I displayed today... can never be
outdone! It proves I have surpassed the greatest
generation.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Next year, the curtain will rise on a new season, in
which I shall reign supreme!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Woooooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Everyone here feels something more than the
difference in skill on display—what they feel is
absolute strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O has shown the power to wrench the
older generation from their position at the top.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grrrr... She completely did us in.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
You okay with this, Grass? Where do we go from
here?!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text: I know... As a parting gift, this was far too painful.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I've spoken with Spe... Perhaps we should run in
the Twinkle Series for the time being.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
A bird cannot take flight when filled with regret.
We should forge a fresh stride, one which even
the Centurial Overlord can't defeat.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now, it is time to conduct the founding ceremony
for the new nation under my name.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
First, to introduce the members of the royal
house.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The king is I! The queen is I! The prince is I! The
princess... I!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And the princess's dearest pooch? I! So comprises
the core of this royal family.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Next, the Centurial Overlord's closest and finest
allies. The newly promoted Captain of Knights...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Is you, Meisho Doto!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! M-m-me?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The one and only. You have proven your skills
and fortitude. Henceforth, we shall run as
partners.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Yes, Opera O!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And taking up residence beside the castle, as to
visit on occasion, is the daughter of House
Ayabe...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Admire Vega!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'd... rather not. I mean, sounds like a meaningless
role anyway.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Meaningless? Hardly! The royal family would not
exist without House Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Let us maintain the strong bonds we've forged, as
neighbors!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Really?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And now, the one most responsible for the
dawning of my new era...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: The one who led me to the throne... my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Yeaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I step onto the stage after Opera O's
introduction.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Without our bond, Trainer, I would have never
reached this glorious height.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Yes, our joint effort—it's what I aspired to create
from the very beginning.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
If I, an Umamusume, and you, a human, can come
together and seize victory...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
A beacon of harmony must emerge between our
races! Bonds which cross borders are the strongest
of all!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ladies and gentlemen! People of any and all races
shall forever be equals in my kingdom... excluding
me of course!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Join hands, work together, and prosper beneath
the Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: One Earth, one family!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We race together! This has always been my true
goal as the Centurial Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
T.M. Opera O is victorious, and now her hidden
ambition has come to light.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Waves of emotion course throughout the
Nakayama Racecourse.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: She doesn't fool me...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
No way it was her goal from the beginning. She
came up with that spiel on the spot.
